title: helianthemum salicifolium subsp. intermedium
intro: Helianthemum salicifolium subsp. intermedium, also known as Rockrose, is a plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, as it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Rockrose can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and boost the immune system.
